name: Brian Blade
abstract: Brian Blade (born July 25, 1970) is an American jazz drummer, composer, and session musician.

about_quotes.speaker: Player
about_quotes.evidence: this very good friend of mine... is now one of the greatest... jazz drummers, Brian Blade. And we went to junior high school together and we played together.

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: Not in a hateful way, because me and him was real tight. We were real cool. ... But it wasn't a hateful thing, because when I saw him, me and him were just cool, totally. Me and him were totally cool.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ellen Rowe
about_quotes.evidence: if somebody is in love with, you know, Brian Blade’s music and you know we’re certainly going to say hey go to all his gigs and try and get to know him and his players.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellen Rowe interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 2, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Christian McBride was there. What’s his name? With Wayne, the drummer. [INTERVIEWER] Brian Blade? [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah. It was all-star. Metheny, Joshua [Redman].
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Ed Soph
about_quotes.evidence: Billy Higgins, Philly Joe, all the great drummers up to Brian Blade today and on. They’re playing the music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ed Soph interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 9, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: That was your group that did that. You had Brian Blade, I think. / Brian Blade was there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
